name: Baisaran Valley (Mini Switzerland)
description: Widely known as the 'Mini Switzerland of India', this picturesque meadow is surrounded by thick pine forests and stunning snow-clad peaks. It is accessed via a thrilling pony ride.
history: A pristine, undeveloped meadow heavily favored by tourists for its striking resemblance to Swiss landscapes.
famousFor: Pony rides, zip-lining, panoramic valley views.
bestTime: April to June, September to November
